title: 3 ways AI is humanizing patient care
summary: Microsoft Dragon Copilot reduces documentation burdens and gives healthcare professionals more time to focus on patient care.

title: Physician burnout is improving but some specialties lag, the AMA finds
summary: The influential physician association surveyed thousands of doctors and found that burnout last year was lower than in 2024 or 2023. Still, certain specialties, especially those on the front lines of care, face an elevated risk of burning out.

title: Times up: Hospitals and the 340B markup program need reforms
summary: Bipartisan agreement. Lowering costs for patients. Saving money for taxpayers. Fix 340B.

title: Psychedelic Stocks Surge After Trump Signs Order Fast-Tracking Drug Research
summary: One analyst applauded Trump’s order as an “official stamp of validation” for psychedelics.

title: Over 80% of PCPs concerned about financial stability over next several years
summary: Despite financial concerns, 93% of physicians report remaining committed to primary care, the survey found.

title: DOJ seeks immediate asset freeze, receivership against telehealth company Zealthy
summary: The Department of Justice filed a motion seeking an immediate asset freeze and receivership for telehealth company Zealthy and its CEO, Kyle Robertson, over alleged fraudulent prescribing and other deceptive practices, according to court documents.

title: GoodRx launches 7.2-mg Wegovy dose for self-pay patients at $399 per month
summary: Alongside the $399 monthly dose, patients can choose to get a two-month supply for $798 or a three-month supply for $1,197.

title: UC Health workers plan open-ended, system-wide strike for May 14
summary: A union representing 25,000 UC Health service and patient care workers said the massive academic health system hasn't negotiated in good faith since contracts expired in 2024.

title: GE HealthCare, RadNet expand AI mammography collaboration
summary: The partnership adds access to a workflow for second reads of complex cases and other software features made by RadNet subsidiary DeepHealth.

title: Seqster launches new data tool to turn clinical sites into 'research-ready data collection points'
summary: The new tool allows clinical sites to share patient-consented electronic health record (EHR) data with clinical trial sponsors, seeking to eliminate barriers to involvement in research.

title: DiMe-led initiative brings together pharma, virtual providers, digital pharmacies to develop blueprint for DTC pharma models
summary: The Digital Medicine Society is leading an effort, in partnership with pharma companies, virtual-first providers and digital pharmacies, to establish a scalable blueprint for direct-to-patient pharma models as the market continues to evolve.

title: APA launches resource library for trusted digital mental health tools
summary: The APA Labs Digital Badge Solutions Library lets users browse resources related to behavioral health and wellness, clinical tools, family, pediatrics and monitoring and sleep, relaxation and mindfulness.

title: OpenAI debuts GPT-Rosalind, a new limited access model for life sciences, and broader Codex plugin on Github
summary: The journey from a laboratory hypothesis to a pharmacy shelf is one of the most grueling marathons in modern industry, typically spanning 10 to 15 years and billions of dollars in investment. Progress is often stymied not just by the inherent mysteries of biology, but by the...

title: Gen AI chatbots continually struggle with differential diagnoses, Mass General Brigham study finds
summary: Mass General Brigham researchers evaluated 21 different generative AI LLMs against 29 standardized clinical vignettes from January to December 2025.

title: Stakeholders urge Labor Department to finalize PBM transparency rule
summary: Employers, lawmakers and more said regulators should hustle to get disclosure mandates for the controversial drug middlemen across the finish line, while PBMs slammed the rule as illegal, unnecessary and anticompetitive.

title: SocialRx teams up with FQHC in NYC to prescribe arts and culture for chronically ill patients
summary: Providers will be able to connect patients to non-clinical, community-based experiences that support mental health and reduce social isolation.

title: Affordability, transparency: A look at large employers' top healthcare concerns
summary: The Purchaser Business Group on Health has released new data that highlights some of the key healthcare priorities of its jumbo employer members, with—perhaps unsurprisingly—the escalating affordability crisis as the biggest challenge.
